tool_args.label: Alternative A: Offset Bus Lanes in Both Directions

payload.description: Convert existing curbside bus lanes to offset lanes and extend offset lanes. In effect at all times (24/7). Bus-only lane located one-lane away from the curb. Single travel lane in both directions. Vehicles allowed to use offset bus lanes for right turns.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Alternative A: Offset Bus Lanes in Both Directions
Convert existing curbside bus lanes to offset lanes and extend offset lanes. In effect at all times (24/7).
Bus-only lane located one-lane away from the curb in effect at all times, 24/7
Existing curbside bus lanes along Fordham Rd would be converted to offset lanes, allowing for more curbside parking and loading zones, in effect 24/7

tool_args.label: Alternative B: Eastbound Busway from Morris Av to Webster Av

payload.description: Eastbound through traffic restrictions on Fordham Rd, except for buses and trucks, with local access on all blocks. Offset lane in westbound direction and offset bus lanes as proposed in Alternative A outside the Busway section. In effect at all times (24/7).
payload.location_text: Fordham Road from Morris Av to Webster Av

normalized_location.raw_text: Fordham Road from Morris Av to Webster Av

evidence_refs.source_quote: Alternative B: Eastbound Busway from Morris Av to Webster Av

Eastbound through traffic restrictions on Fordham Rd, except for buses and trucks, with local access on all blocks. Offset lane in westbound direction and offset bus lanes as proposed in Alternative A outside the Busway section. In effect at all times (24/7).
Eastbound through traffic on Fordham Rd would be restricted to Local Access Only, except for buses and trucks; in effect at all times (24/7)

tool_args.label: Alternative C: Two-Way Busway between Jerome & Webster Aves

payload.description: Both eastbound and westbound through traffic restrictions on Fordham Rd, except for buses and trucks, with local access on all blocks; also includes offset bus lanes proposed in Alternative A outside the Busway section. In effect at all times (24/7).
payload.location_text: Fordham Road between Jerome Av and Webster Av

normalized_location.raw_text: Fordham Road between Jerome Av and Webster Av

evidence_refs.source_quote: Alternative C: Two-Way Busway between Jerome & Webster Aves

Both eastbound and westbound through traffic on Fordham Rd would be restricted to Local Access Only, except for buses and trucks; in effect at all times (24/7)

tool_args.label: Alternative A selected as best treatment
